_comment: NON-NORMATIVE / DRAFT fixture for Project A (.klickd / klickdskill marketing video). Targets RFC-001 v1 (.klickd v4). Synthetic only: no real-person likeness, no real licence, no real hashes, no production URIs. All hash/DOI/licence values are placeholders. This file does NOT validate against any current schema in schema/ or schemas/.
_status: DRAFT — fixture prep only; no render authorised

entries.label: Synthetic English narrator (calm, technical)
entries.x_notes: Synthetic narrator — no real human voice was sampled. RFC-001 §5 currently lists producer.kind values 'human' and 'model'; this fixture uses 'model' with a synthetic-narrator name. See v4-media-test-pack.md §9 open question 2.

entries.label: Abstract geometric silhouette (non-photoreal) used between model logos
entries.x_notes: Geometric / abstract only. MUST NOT be replaced with a photoreal subject without re-approval.

entries.label: Diagram morph: identity → knowledge → ethics → media context
entries.x_notes: Built from public RFC text; no proprietary diagram source.

entries.label: Closing-card layout (CTAs: GitHub, PyPI, npm, Zenodo) + licence line
entries.x_notes: x_cta_urls lists the ONLY outbound URLs allowed for Project A. PLACEHOLDER_* values must be replaced before any render.
